goal_text:
You are looking for the 'Addenbrookes Hospital'. The hospital should have the 'neurology neurosurgery' department.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for hospital. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for the Addenbrookes Hospital. The hospital should have the neurology neurosurgery department
Make sure you get postcode and address
